name: bitbank-lab-cli
description: Experimental CLI & Agent Skills starter kit for bitbank — botters lab community edition. Market data, paper trading, account read, and Private API trading with safety guards.

interface.shortDescription: Pass raw OHLCV from bitbank to the model — fully customize indicators and logic.
interface.longDescription: A thin CLI access layer over the bitbank API, plus an Agent Skills starter kit for Claude Code / Cursor. Unlike MCP's fixed implementations, raw data is passed to the LLM so indicator parameters and logic stay fully customizable. Bundles 12 skills including paper trading (virtual funds × live prices), portfolio analysis, technical indicators, volatility profiling, correlation analysis, backtesting, signal exploration, and recipes (pre-trade check / portfolio review).
defaultPrompt: BTC の RSI を見て
ポートフォリオの状況を見せて
BTC を仮想で 0.01 買って
